---
title: "Category CRP"
description: "Within vs. between category transitions"
---

## Overview

**Category CRP** compares transition probabilities within categories vs. between categories, revealing categorical clustering.

## Usage

```python
from jaxcmr.analyses.catcrp import plot_cat_crp

plot_cat_crp(
    datasets=[data],
    category_labels=categories,
    labels=["Data"],
)
```
